_comment: AAII sentiment has no scrapeable free source (aaii.com blocks bots) — update 'aaii_sentiment' by hand weekly from https://www.aaii.com/sentimentsurvey (released Thursdays). The other three fields are fallback values only, used when the live scrape in fetch_data.py fails for that run — refresh them occasionally so the fallback doesn't go stale, but they are not the primary source.
